latestValidationChecks.criterion: docker-compose up으로 서버, Redis, PostgreSQL 전체 실행 가능
latestValidationChecks.evidence: docker-compose.yml defines server, postgres:16-alpine, and redis:7-alpine services with healthchecks, depends_on conditions, persistent volumes, and a separate migrate profile service.

latestValidationChecks.criterion: /auth/google → OAuth 콜백 → 세션 쿠키 발급 정상 동작
latestValidationChecks.evidence: server/src/auth/routes.js exposes /auth/google and /auth/google/callback; passport.js implements GoogleStrategy with DB upsert; sessions stored in Redis via express-session + connect-redis.

latestValidationChecks.criterion: DB 마이그레이션 파일 실행 후 캐릭터/매치 테이블 생성 확인
latestValidationChecks.evidence: server/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql creates 5 tables (users, characters, matches, match_participants, oracle_invocations) and a match_history view; migrate.js runs idempotently with schema_migrations tracking.

validationChecks.criterion: docker-compose up으로 서버, Redis, PostgreSQL 전체 실행 가능
validationChecks.evidence: docker-compose.yml defines server, postgres (postgres:16-alpine with healthcheck), and redis (redis:7-alpine with healthcheck) services with proper depends_on conditions and persistent volumes. A separate 'migrate' profile service handles schema application.

validationChecks.criterion: /auth/google → OAuth 콜백 → 세션 쿠키 발급 정상 동작
validationChecks.evidence: server/src/auth/routes.js exposes GET /auth/google (initiates OAuth), GET /auth/google/callback (handles callback, sets session via express-session + connect-redis), GET /auth/me (returns session user), and POST /auth/logout. passport.js implements GoogleStrategy with DB upsert and serialize/deserializeUser.

validationChecks.criterion: DB 마이그레이션 파일 실행 후 캐릭터/매치 테이블 생성 확인
validationChecks.evidence: server/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql creates 5 tables (users, characters, matches, match_participants, oracle_invocations) and 1 view (match_history). Node validation confirmed all 5 CREATE TABLE statements and the view are present. server/src/db/migrate.js runs migrations idempotently tracking applied files in schema_migrations table.
